name: Hot Pepper Jelly
recipeIngredient: 2 medium green peppers, seeded and cut up
9 jalapeno peppers (about 3), seeded and cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the peppers and cider vinegar in a blender. Blend for 2-3 minutes.
2. Pour the mixture over the sugar in a large pot. Stir constantly until boiling.
3. Remove from heat and skim any foam that rises to the surface.
4. Add the Certo Pectin and green food coloring.
5. Pour the jelly into sterilized jars, leaving some headspace.
6. Seal the jars tightly.
